# emu8086web

> Modern browser-based 8086 microprocessor assembler and step debugger.

## Summary

emu8086web is an open-source web IDE for writing, assembling, and debugging Intel 8086 assembly (MASM-style). It runs entirely in the browser with no install — a modernization of classic emu8086 for all platforms.

## Key features

- Interpretive 8086 assembler and CPU emulator
- Step / run debugger with breakpoints, registers, flags, memory, and stack views
- DOS INT 21h and BIOS INT 10h console I/O
- Multi-file workspace with named save
- Shareable program links
- Light and dark themes

## Primary URL

The application root `/` opens the IDE directly.

## Documentation

- README.md — setup and usage
- docs/emulator.md — instruction and interrupt matrix
- project.md — product vision and roadmap
- CONTRIBUTING.md — how to contribute

## Author

Developed by Nafis Islam Kabbo.

See package.json / lib/version.ts (semver).
